message:
fix(demo): remove duplicate key handlers and sidebar methods in code explorer

Removes accidentally duplicated code in the code explorer screen.

Key handler cleanup:
- Remove duplicate (KeyCode::Char('m'), Modifiers::NONE) handler
- Remove duplicate (KeyCode::Char('M'), Modifiers::SHIFT) handler
- Keep single handlers for mode switching: m/M for next/prev mode

Sidebar method cleanup:
- Remove duplicate render_sidebar_query_lab() implementation
- Remove duplicate render_sidebar_exec_plan() implementation
- These methods were added twice in previous commits

The duplicates were causing:
- Unreachable code warnings from the compiler
- Unnecessary binary bloat from duplicate method bodies
- Potential confusion during code maintenance

No behavioral changes - the remaining handlers and methods are identical
to what was duplicated.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
